sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 31:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 31:1
items.html: When Malchut of the Rosh is not completely refined to phase three, but receives phase four of clothing of the male of the vessel of Keter inside her, she then participates with phase three of the Rosh. In this manner, she draws the light of the upper Keter, and the lights do not exchange their places, see answer 72. (Item 9, and Inner Light there)
